'''fokagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vedic|vedic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vedic|vedic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fokagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || fokagithi || fokagiji || fokagishi || fokagiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || fokaguthu || fokaguju || fokagushu || fokaguku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || fokaguthu || fokaguju || fokagushu || fokaguku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || fokagufthuf || fokagufjuf || fokagufshuf || fokagufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || fokagethe || fokageje || fokageshe || fokageke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || fokagotho || fokagojo || fokagosho || fokagoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || fokagotho || fokagojo || fokagosho || fokagoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || fokagofthof || fokagofjof || fokagofshof || fokagofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || fokagïfthïf || fokagïfjïf || fokagïfshïf || fokagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || fokagïfthïf || fokagïfjïf || fokagïfshïf || fokagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || fokagïfthïf || fokagïfjïf || fokagïfshïf || fokagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || fokagïfthïf || fokagïfjïf || fokagïfshïf || fokagïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || fokagæthæ || fokagæjæ || fokagæshæ || fokagækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || fokagatha || fokagaja || fokagasha || fokagaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || fokagatha || fokagaja || fokagasha || fokagaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || fokagafthaf || fokagafjaf || fokagafshaf || fokagafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || fokagasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || fokagshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || fokagroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || fokagmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || fokagyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofokagnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofokagnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofokagnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofokagnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || fokakagasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || fokakagshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || fokakagroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || fokakagmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || fokakagyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofokakagnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofokakagnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofokakagnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofokakagnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || fekægasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || fekægshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || fekægroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || fekægmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || fekægyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofekægnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofekægnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofekægnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofekægnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || fokfagasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || fokfagshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || fokfagroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || fokfagmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || fokfagyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gofokfagnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gofokfagnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gofokfagnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gofokfagnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
